## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Managing Editor role for GrowthX's AI-led growth community and publication.](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an educational community and content platform focused on AI adoption for non-technical roles in marketing, sales, and operations](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [The Managing Editor role involves owning GrowthX's content strategy, production, and curation across various formats (courses, workshops, articles, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Peter has extensive experience in content marketing, AI implementation, and building automated content workflows at Animals agency](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [The role is long-term, with potential to build and manage a team as the content operation scales](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and AI-Led Growth Initiative

  - [GrowthX operates as a growth agency leveraging AI for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Building a community (AI-led growth) to educate professionals on AI adoption](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Developing courses, workshops, podcasts, and other educational content](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [60 paying members currently consuming their marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Plans to launch a product and potentially productize their internal AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Managing Editor Role and Responsibilities

  - [Own GrowthX's internal publication and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Create high-quality, educational content on AI adoption in marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Repurpose content across various formats (video, written, courses)](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Experiment with different content types and volumes](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Facilitate partnerships with industry experts for specialized content](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Build and potentially manage a team as the content operation grows](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

### Peter's Background and Experience

  - [8-9 years in content marketing, including freelance and agency work](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Current role: Associate Head of Content at Animals agency](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Focus on content strategy, client management, and AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Built automated LinkedIn thought leadership programs for clients](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Developing AI workflows in Aeros for content research, ideation, and production](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### AI in Content Marketing Discussion

  - [Challenges in teaching non-technical team members to use AI effectively](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Importance of detailed and explicit prompting for AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Documenting AI workflows and use cases for team adoption](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Shift in content marketing landscape due to AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Content Strategy and Production Approaches

  - [Video as core content, with written pieces derived or expanded from it](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Mix of high-production, high-investment content and experimental, high-volume content](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Plans to create comprehensive resources on topics like GEO and AEO](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Inspiration from platforms like deep learning.ai for expert-led courses](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss Peter's candidacy with the team](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with next steps, potentially including an assignment and joint call with other team members](https://fathom.video/share/jby4LZPCNajFBjL95rfvtiVdLuGD-hVC?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
